# OAuth.CreatePkcePair method

Generates a PKCE `S256` pair (spec §23.5): a random 32-byte verifier (base64url) and the challenge `base64url(SHA256(verifier))`. Backed by `System.Security.Cryptography` via [`Pkce`](../../Stackific.Mcp.Protocol/Pkce.md).

```csharp
public static PkcePair CreatePkcePair()
```

## Return Value

The PKCE pair.
